metadata.description: Skills, commands, and plugins for architects, designers, and AEC professionals — site research, zoning, programming, specifications, materials research, and presentations.

plugins.name: 00-due-diligence
plugins.description: Property due diligence for Western Australia — Landgate, inHerit, LGA DA registers, SAT, DWER, DFES, AHIS, NatureMap.

plugins.name: 01-site-planning
plugins.description: Site planning skills for Western Australia — climate (BoM), bushfire (DFES), mobility (Transperth), demographics (ABS), heritage and neighbourhood character. Falls back to international sources for overseas projects.

plugins.name: 02-zoning-analysis
plugins.description: Planning and zoning envelope analysis — Western Australia (MRS / LPS / R-Codes) and Maldonado, Uruguay (TONE). Includes interactive 3D envelope viewer.

plugins.name: 03-programming
plugins.description: Architectural programming skills — occupancy load calculations (NCC 2022 Part D3 for WA, IBC fallback for international) and workplace space programming in metric / NLA.

plugins.name: 04-specifications
plugins.description: Outline specification writer — NATSPEC for Australian / WA practice (NATSPEC Building and NATSPEC Domestic) with AS / AS-NZS standards and NCC 2022 references; CSI MasterFormat fallback for overseas projects.

plugins.name: 05-sustainability
plugins.description: Sustainability skills — EPD parsing, research, comparison and NATSPEC specification with GWP thresholds. Aligned to Green Star Buildings Responsible Products and NABERS Embodied Emissions for AU / WA, with LEED v4.1 MRc2 fallback for international.

plugins.name: 06-materials-research
plugins.description: Product and materials research skills — FF&E product search, spec extraction, cleanup, PDF parsing, and image processing.

plugins.name: 07-presentations
plugins.description: Presentation skills — HTML slide deck generation and color palette creation.

plugins.name: 08-dispatcher
plugins.description: Smart router and help menu — describe a task and get routed to the right agent or skill.
